item.title: Howden Re strengthens LatAm & Caribbean capabilities with two senior appointments
item.description: Howden Re announces the appointments of Carlos Garcia as Managing Director and Karina Lopez as Director, further strengthening its Latin America and Caribbean offering

item.title: Insurtech Sixfold raised $30 mn Series B to scale GenAI Underwriter platform
item.description: Sixfold has secured $30 mn in Series B funding to expand its AI-driven underwriting platform. Brewer Lane led the round, with strategic backing from Guidewire

item.title: LatAm insurtech funding jumps 117% to $199 mn
item.description: Mapfre reports 536 active LatAm insurtechs and $199 mn in funding in 2025, as the ecosystem shifts from distribution toward technology enablement

item.title: Lockton Re strengthens Latin America team with senior hires
item.description: Lockton Re appoints Dario Luna as Regional Leader of Strategic Risk Solutions and adds Antonio Rodriguez to expand Latin America and Caribbean capabilities

item.title: Cargo theft shifts online as insurers warn of rising digital freight fraud
item.description: IUMI and TAPA EMEA warn cargo crime is surging worldwide, with digital fraud replacing physical theft as losses reach billions across supply chains

item.title: Fitch Ratings sees neutral 2026 outlook for LatAm insurance market
item.description: Fitch Ratings sets a neutral 2026 outlook for Latin American insurers, flagging Mexico as deteriorating amid tax reforms and margin pressure

item.title: Planetun boosts AI investment as digital inspections surge across insurance
item.description: Brazil’s Planetun expands its AI-driven inspection and automation tools as demand for digital insurance services surges across LATAM

item.title: Insurtech Federato launched agentic AI platform to overhaul insurance underwriting
item.description: Federato debuts agentic AI and Control Tower, aiming to modernize underwriting, portfolio management, and insurer workflows beyond legacy systems

item.title: Brazilian insurtech 180° Insurance raises $9.2 mn pre-Series B to scale AI insurance
item.description: 180° Insurance secures $6.4mn equity and $2.8mn debt in pre-Series B, bringing total raised to $46mn as it expands AI-driven B2B2C insurance in Brazil

item.title: Fitch warns reinsurance competition squeezing earnings in Latin America
item.description: Fitch flags soft pricing, sovereign risk, and a wide protection gap despite steady demand for catastrophe cover

item.title: Insurtech financing in Latin America reached $240 mn in 2025, a 370% increase
item.description: Insurtech financing in Latin America reached $121 mn in H1 2025, a 370% increase compared to the same period in 2024, according to a report by Digital Insurance LATAM

item.title: Insurtech Kennedys IQ launches neuro-symbolic AI solution for insurance market
item.description: Insurtech Kennedys IQ, the technology division of Kennedys Law, launched Kennedys IQ SmartRisk, the first fully explainable neuro-symbolic AI risk analysis solution

item.title: InsurTech Olé Life raised $13 mn in Series B funding
item.description: Olé Life, a Latin American InsurTech company, has raised $13 mn in Series B funding, led by PayPal Ventures

item.title: AI-insurtech Federato raised $40 mn Series C funding led by StepStone Group
item.description: Insurtech Federato, AI-powered insurance underwriting platform, has raised a $40 mn Series C funding round, led by StepStone Group

item.title: Insurtech Descartes expands climate & emerging risk parametric offerings in LatAm
item.description: Parametric insurtech Descartes Underwriting announced plans to broaden its climate and emerging risk parametric offerings across Mexico and Latin America

item.title: Lloyd’s will open a new office in Miami to enhance business in LatAm
item.description: Lloyd’s, a leading global insurance and reinsurance marketplace, will open a new office in Miami to enhance its business in Latin America and the Caribbean

item.title: Insurtech Sostengo raised $3.8 mn seed funding for Latam & U.S. Hispanic entry
item.description: Central American Insurtech Sostengo raised $3.8 mn seed funding for Latam markets and U.S. Hispanic entry. With 103% premium growth

item.title: Continental Assist partnered with parametric insurtech Baoba
item.description: Continental Assist, a North America-based travel assistance company, announced a partnership with Baoba Insurtech, a parametric insurance technology

item.title: Latin American reinsurance influenced by global market pricing
item.description: The Latin American (LatAm) reinsurance sector is highly influenced by global reinsurance pricing conditions, given its smaller size relative to the global marke

item.title: SaaS insurtech Zuru Latam aimed at digitizing insurance for the logistics
item.description: Zuru Latam has unveiled its latest commercial offering D2D, aimed at digitizing and meeting the insurance needs of the logistics industry

item.title: Insurtech Bdeo raised an additional €7.5 mn to accelerate its international expansion
item.description: Insurtech Bdeo has raised an additional €7.5 mn to accelerate its international expansion and strengthen its position across Europe and Latin America

item.title: Fitch`s Outlook for the Latin American insurance sector is neutral
item.description: Outlook for the Latin American insurance sector is neutral in most markets based on stable industry profile and operating environments (IPOE)

item.title: Mexico’s Insurance Industry Outlook 2026: $26 bn premiums, CAGR of 7.5%
item.description: Mexico’s general insurance industry is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.5%, from $18.2 billion in 2021 to $26.1 billion in 2026
